audit_items.proof_trace: The assignment `s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp` at line 353 is the sole write on the auction-start path, executes exactly when `asset != s_assetOut` inside `performUpkeep`, and is not overwritten by subsequent calls (`_onAuctionStart` in both the base and GPV2 override touches only ERC20 approvals). The guard at line 327 ensures the mapping is zero before writing, so the post-condition `s_auctionStarts[asset] == block.timestamp` holds after every auction start.
